title: Harthamah b. A'yan's journeying to al-Ma 'mun's court at Marw and his fate there
description: Harthamah b. A'yan's journeying to al-Ma 'mun's court at Marw and his fate there. Recorded under the year 198 AH (814–815 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
